ideation: This sequence simulates the action of taking a photo with a camera. The robot will raise both arms to shoulder height, mimicking the holding of a camera, then slightly lower and extend the arms to capture the image, and finally return to a relaxed position. The sequence will emphasize the smooth transition between these poses, creating a natural-looking gesture. In the first frame, both arms start at the sides in a neutral position.  In the second frame, both arms raise to shoulder height, palms facing inward, as if holding a camera. In the third frame, the arms move slightly forward and downward, simulating the act of taking the picture. In the fourth frame, the arms return to the shoulder-height position. In the final frame, both arms return to their original relaxed position at the sides.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to frame
arms raise to shoulder height, holding the camera
arms extend slightly, capturing the moment
arms pull back to framing position
arms return to rest at the sides
